MARKET WRAP — Mar 14, 2026

Markets traded in classic stagflation mode with elevated VIX at 27.19 signaling persistent uncertainty around growth-inflation dynamics. Risk assets showed mixed conviction
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 14, 2026 Markets traded in classic stagflation mode with elevated VIX at 27.19 signaling persistent uncertainty around growth-inflation dynamics. Risk assets showed mixed conviction as Bitcoin held near $71K while traditional hedges like gold pushed higher, reflecting investors' struggle to position for an environment where neither aggressive risk-on nor defensive plays offer clear refuge.
